imgData.name: For Patients
imgData.title: On-Demand Teleconsultation
imgData.des: On-demand teleconsultation provides an immediate, secure link between remote patients and specialized physicians.

imgData.name: For Doctors
imgData.title: Next-Gen Digital Chambers
imgData.des: The next-generation digital medical chamber is a compact, autonomous healthcare hub that uses AI and biometric sensors.

imgData.name: For Researchers
imgData.title: Anonymized Clinical Cohorts
imgData.des: Anonymized clinical cohorts aggregate de-identified patient data to enable large-scale medical research without compromising privacy.

imgData.name: For Institutions
imgData.title: Decentralized Hospital Networks
imgData.des: Decentralized hospital networks distribute authority and data across multiple independent nodes for faster local decisions.

imgData.name: Ancient Care
imgData.title: Ancient Medical Techniques
imgData.des: Ancient medical techniques use time-tested, nature-based practices like herbalism and acupuncture to treat ailments.
